case_title: JAIME C JENSEN VS. ROBIN BAGG et al

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JENSEN, JAIME C AS TO DEFENDANT BAGG, ROBIN BAGG, LISA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-06-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-21-2002
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-12-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-12-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-22-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-21-2003 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS AND RULES. THEREFORE, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT BAGG, ROBIN BAGG, LISA
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JAIME C JENSEN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-12-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-27-2002. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST JAIME C JENSEN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-26-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-10-2003. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by Leticia Perez, CSR #7782. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Continued To May-21-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in pro per is sanctioned 250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/21/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by Leticia Perez. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Continued To Mar-26-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. The order to show cause is reset for 3/26/03 @ 1:30PM. Proceedings reported by Patricia Van Steenberge. (212)
